fields.name: trade_records
fields.description: A list of trade records exchanged between banking departments

children.name: trade_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the trade

children.name: timestamp
children.description: Timestamp of when the trade was executed

children.name: trader_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the trader who initiated the trade

children.name: trader_name
children.description: Name of the trader who initiated the trade

children.name: department
children.description: Department responsible for the trade (Investments)

children.name: asset_class
children.description: Asset class of the traded instrument (Equities, Fixed Income, Derivatives)

children.name: instrument
children.description: Specific instrument traded (IBM Stock, US Treasury Bond, EUR/USD Currency Forward)

children.name: isin
children.description: International Securities Identification Number for the instrument

children.name: side
children.description: Side of the trade (BUY, SELL)

children.name: quantity
children.description: Number of units traded

children.name: price
children.description: Price per unit traded

children.name: settlement_currency
children.description: Currency used for settlement (USD)

children.name: trade_value
children.description: Total value of the trade

children.name: counterparty
children.description: Name of the counterparty (Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, Deutsche Bank)

children.name: counterparty_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the counterparty (GS-001, JPM-001, DB-001)

children.name: settlement_date
children.description: Date of settlement for the trade

children.name: trading_venue
children.description: Trading venue where the trade was executed (NYSE, OTC)

children.name: execution_venue
children.description: Execution venue where the trade was executed (Electronic Communication Network, Phone)

children.name: risk_level
children.description: Risk level of the trade (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH)

children.name: compliance_status
children.description: Compliance status of the trade (APPROVED, PENDING_REVIEW, UNDER_INVESTIGATION)

children.name: report_date
children.description: Date of report generation

children.name: total_trades
children.description: Total number of trades in the message

children.name: total_value_usd
children.description: Total value of all trades in USD

children.name: source_system
children.description: Source system that generated the message (Trading System v4.2)

children.name: data_classification
children.description: Classification of the data (CONFIDENTIAL)
